summary: Completed testing of Edit Opponent feature, Stats tab, and Season Stats page. All backend APIs pass (11/11 tests). Frontend UI verified working correctly with proper text visibility.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Opponent feature fully implemented and tested. All dialogs have proper white text on dark slate backgrounds. Backend PUT /api/schools/{school_id}/teams/{team_id} endpoint working correctly for name, color, logo_url, and roster updates.

edit_opponent_dialog.details: Edit Opponent dialog opens correctly with Team Name, Team Color (color picker), Logo URL fields, and Manage Roster button. All fields have proper data-testid attributes.

edit_opponent_save.details: Successfully updates opponent name, color, logo_url via API. E2E test verified name change persists and displays in opponent list.

opponent_roster_dialog.details: Opponent Roster dialog opens from Edit Opponent dialog. Shows player entry form (#, Name, Position, Class) and current roster list with remove buttons.

opponent_roster_save.details: Backend API successfully updates roster array. Tested via pytest with add/remove player operations.

text_visibility.details: All dialog text uses white/slate-200 colors on dark slate-800/900 backgrounds. Labels, inputs, buttons all have proper contrast.

stats_tab.details: Stats tab shows 'Season Statistics' heading with list of seasons. Each season card shows sport icon, name, and games count. Cards are clickable to navigate to Season Stats page.

season_stats_page.details: Season Stats page shows Season Record (W-L), three tabs (Team Stats, Player Stats, Schedule). Empty state shows 'No completed games yet' message.

screenshots: .screenshots/opponents_tab.png - Opponents tab with edit buttons visible
.screenshots/edit_opponent_dialog.png - Edit Opponent dialog with name/color/logo fields
.screenshots/opponent_roster_dialog.png - Opponent Roster dialog with player entry form
.screenshots/season_stats_page.png - Season Stats page with record and tabs
.screenshots/after_save_opponent.png - Opponents list after saving name change
